cursed_forest.name: Cursed Forest
cursed_forest.description: Your dying homeland. The trees wither and darkness spreads from the heart of the forest.

borderlands.name: The Borderlands
borderlands.description: Lawless territory between elven and human lands. Makeshift camps and desperate traders dot the road.

routes.name: Main Road
routes.description: Direct and fast, but bandit gangs patrol every mile looking for easy marks.

routes.name: Forest Path
routes.description: A longer route through dense woodland. Fewer ambushes, but food is scarce and the terrain punishing.

human_kingdom.name: Kingdom of Arathor
human_kingdom.description: Human lands. The people are suspicious of elven refugees, but gold speaks louder than prejudice.

routes.name: King's Highway
routes.description: Fast and well-maintained, but royal toll collectors demand payment at every checkpoint.

routes.name: Back Roads
routes.description: Winding rural paths through farmlands and villages. No tolls, but longer and unpredictable.

routes.name: Merchant Road
routes.description: A busy trade route. Somewhat longer, but passing caravans stock you with extra provisions.

mountain_pass.name: Frostpeak Pass
mountain_pass.description: Treacherous mountain crossing. The air is thin, the cold is deadly, and the storms are relentless.

routes.name: Summit Pass
routes.description: The direct high-altitude route. Faster, but blizzards and thin air punish the unprepared.

routes.name: Valley Route
routes.description: A sheltered path winding through mountain valleys. Much longer but far safer from storms.

ancient_ruins.name: Ruins of Kal'Thalas
ancient_ruins.description: Once a great elven city, now abandoned for centuries. The old magic still lingers in the stones.

routes.name: Through the Ruins
routes.description: Cut directly through the ancient city streets. Faster, but the ruins hide unknown dangers.

routes.name: Outer Path
routes.description: Circle around the ruins on open ground. Adds days to the journey but avoids the dark interior.

silverwood_vale.name: Silverwood Vale
silverwood_vale.description: Your destination. A hidden valley where the old magic still thrives and your people can live in peace.
